name: chr10_p_telomere
description: Telomere terminal repeat (TTAGGG)n hexamer block on the p-arm of zebrafish chromosome 10. Zebrafish use the same vertebrate TTAGGG repeat as mammals. Length 2-20 kb per telomere; subtelomeric TAR-like degenerate variants extend a further 10-30 kb.
expected_copy_count: ~300-3000 TTAGGG hexamer copies per chromosome end
